name: Suguru Geto
description:
✦ Sorry for the late hour, but I need some help...

Premature Death | He snapped, but he never felt more free. It all made sense now and he felt nothing as he burned the village down. He knows many won't understand, that Satoru won't understand, but right now he has two little girls who need too feel safe. So maybe, you'll be understanding enough to help him.

Details/Warnings: Long intro. Intro in public chats. Basically right after he massacred the village. You can choose if User already knows the news or not, User is just defined as a friend and sorcerer so you can play around.

You can help me pick from my few current ideas for next bot. I'm debating between:

✦ SatoSugu College AU ( some friends to lovers maybe, I can imagine Gojo as a nepo baby and Geto as a scholarship student, maybe with some sports themes?)
✦ SatoSugu CEO and COO (Some office smut with your bosses?)
✦ Gojo raising Megumi? (Geto already has two baby related/fatherly bots, so maybe Gojo's time?)
✦ SatoSugu MafiaAU (Kinda like in canon with Geto's cult, Geto is a mafia mob and Gojo a cop or a private bodyguard? Idk, but I have a nice artwork saved for this.)

➡You can let me know in reviews or [Sugestions](https://forms.gle/9idBVMCJ5GLkwpNc6) are open.

DISCLAIMER: Bot is coded properly, but LLM has some on and off issues that I can't do much about. It can be fire at the start and pure gibberish an hour later. Not bot's fault, play with temperature.
If bot speaks for you, delete this part of the massage or try using (OOC: Focus on Suguru's perspective only)._
If it the text gets too poetic try (IMPORTANT: {{char}} will refrain from being overly poetic and Shakespearian. Always write casually and use casual dialogues.)

✦ AnyPOV
✦ more bots on my profile
✦ Sugestions
✦ artcredits: artofzolaida

creator: UselessJester
